channel.title: supermodel-api-docs Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: ApiSpecification Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Defines the core RESTful interface, data models, and endpoint contracts using the OpenAPI standard. Architectural overview of the ApiSpecification domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: PortalConfiguration Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Manages the metadata, rendering rules, and external presentation of the documentation site. Architectural overview of the PortalConfiguration domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: TechnicalDocumentation Domain — supermodel-api-docs Architecture
item.description: Handles the narrative technical writing and usage guides for consumers using MDX components. Architectural overview of the TechnicalDocumentation domain in the supermodel-api-docs codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: docs.json — supermodel-api-docs Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for docs.json, a json file in the supermodel-api-docs codebase.
